manifest.name: Cypher

name: Cypher

releases.author: aths7
releases.description:
Welcome to the first release of the **Cypher Plugin** for Obsidian! This plugin adds a layer of intrigue and visual flair to your notes by transforming text into a unique, icon-based cypher with just a click. Perfect for keeping sensitive info visually hidden or simply spicing up your note-taking experience.

#### Key Features:
- **Toggle Cypher Mode**: Quickly switch between normal and cyphered text with a single click.
- **Real-Time Icon Transformation**: Text converts to symbols as you type, creating a smooth and uninterrupted experience.
- **Unique Symbols for Each Case**: Every letter (uppercase and lowercase) has a distinct symbol, making each word visually unique.
- **Easy Reversion**: Toggle off cypher mode to revert instantly to plain text without data loss.
- **Intelligent Backspace Handling**: Prevents unwanted spaces and symbol buildup while editing.

Enhance your notes with visual style and mystery—install the Cypher Plugin today!
releases.name: Cypher Plugin v1.0 - Transform Your Notes with Enigmatic Icon-Based Text!
